name: Subsurface
title: Subsurface (Fork: full ore richness)
author: Natha (forked locally)
description: Fork of Subsurface by Natha. This fork removes the top-surface ore patch richness reduction: the original mod multiplies ore amounts on the surface (e.g. Nauvis) by 0.1 (10%) at distance > 130 from spawn, turning a 1M patch into 100k. This fork restores them to 100%. Also adds the /restore-ore-amounts command to fix already-generated chunks.
